_README: Synthesized pre-stage package list used by TestRegression20260511 to
exercise the engine's bootstrap_resolved classification (PRD G3, AC-1).
PROVENANCE: The PRD v1.0 referenced 'data/builder-pkg-preq.json' as the
canonical pre-stage list, but no such file exists in vmware/photon. The
upstream pre-stage definition lives in support/package-builder/constants.py
as three Python lists: listCoreToolChainPackages, listToolChainPackages,
listToolChainRPMsToInstall. See:
https://github.com/vmware/photon/blob/0b37ad6f1c30/support/package-builder/constants.py
This fixture is the union of those three lists at commit 0b37ad6f1c30
(vmware/photon master tip as of 2026-05-11), augmented with the seven
packages whose presence in the 37-node toolchain SCC is documented in
findings/2026-05-13-no-builder-pkg-preq-json.md. The augmentation is
required because upstream's listToolChainRPMsToInstall does not enumerate
every SCC member -- a discrepancy tracked by PRD Q5 (whether the engine's
SCC-membership classification should be relaxed, or upstream should expand
the canonical pre-stage list).
The engine walks any JSON structure and collects every string leaf into
the pre-stage set, so the partitioning here is documentary only -- only
the string values matter for classification.
Frozen-in-time: this fixture pins the 2026-05-11 master state. Do not
update it on later refresh; create a new dated fixture if a future scan
needs separate regression coverage.
_source_commit: 0b37ad6f1c30 (vmware/photon master, 2025-05-09 -- the master tip current on 2026-05-11)
